geography.top_us_states_note: Percent denominator is US-papers-with-state-inferred (n=414), not all US papers. 50 US rows had no inferable state. Per Iris extraction QA, 55.6 percent of country/state inferences are name-only; treat single-state numbers as approximate plus/minus 5 to 10 percentage points.
